privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: This personal portfolio is maintained by Sergio Santos and aims to present professional projects and articles. We respect your privacy and comply with the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD – Law No. 13.709/2018) and the European General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR – Regulation (EU) 2016/679).

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
items: We do not intentionally collect personally identifiable data.
Technical data (such as IP address, browser, or device) may be processed for security, performance, and analytics purposes without direct identification.
If third-party services (e.g., Google Analytics) are used, data is processed in an anonymized and aggregated manner.
dataCollection.legalBasis: Processing is based on user consent (Article 6(1)(a) GDPR and LGPD Art. 7º, I).

cookies.title: Cookies
items: Essential cookies: required for basic functionality (e.g., language settings).
Analytics cookies: only activated with explicit user consent.
You may manage or withdraw your preferences at any time.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing
items: No personal data is sold, rented, or shared for commercial purposes.
External services (GitHub, LinkedIn) are governed by their own policies.

rights.title: Your Rights
items: Confirm whether your data is processed.

ccpa.title: U.S. Privacy Rights (CCPA/CPRA)
ccpa.description: Under applicable U.S. laws, users may request that their personal data is not sold or shared. This website does not sell personal data.

security.title: Security
security.description: We apply appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: For privacy-related inquiries, please use the contact information provided in this portfolio.
